idea-plugin.name: Markora
idea-plugin.description:
Markora brings Notion-style WYSIWYG Markdown editing to JetBrains IDEs. Edit Markdown files in a block editor that renders as you type — no preview pane needed.

Features

  • BlockNote-based block editor with slash commands
  • LaTeX math (KaTeX) and Mermaid diagrams render inline
  • Debounced auto-save to standard CommonMark + GFM Markdown
  • Image drag/drop and clipboard paste auto-organized into images/
  • Light/Dark theme synced with the IDE
  • External links open in your system browser — won't break IDE flow

Compatibility

Works on IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, RubyMine, PhpStorm, Rider, CLion 2024.2 or newer (with JCEF enabled, which is the default).

Links

  • Website
  • GitHub
